abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Potency
abilities.text: When an enemy would gain an Injured token due to this model's Black Blood ability but cannot because it already has an Injured token, it is dealt 1 damage.

abilities.name: Resilient
abilities.text: Attacks targeting this model reduce raises they receive by 1 (to a minimum of 0).

actions.name: Vital Strike
actions.effects: An ally within 2" of the target gains a Glutted token.

triggers.name: Battle Rush
triggers.text: Choose an ally within 2" of the target. The chosen model is dealt 1 damage and gains a Focused token.

actions.name: The Strong Survive
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may not target the same model more than once per activation.
actions.effects: The target may declare an attack action. After resolving, if the target is on the enemy table half, it may resolve its Relish in Blood ability as if it had attacked and damaged an enemy.

triggers.name: Bloody Vigor
triggers.text: Allies within (aura)4" of the target heal 2.

triggers.name: On Dark Wings
triggers.text: Place the target within 3" of its current location.

actions.name: Dark Bargain
actions.effects: Deal 1 irreducible damage to the target, then the target may declare the Interact action.

triggers.name: Meat for the Young
triggers.text: An ally within 6" gains a Glutted token.
